description: Submit and execute a multi-step batch action plan (actions + optional initialInput and data wiring) in a single call. The server validates the plan and, if valid, immediately executes all actions in order and returns aggregated results (or, for very large results, an MCP resource URI). Use this tool whenever the user's request requires two or more tool calls; do not call individual tools sequentially for multi-step workflows.

initialInput.description: Optional initial data for the chain. Actions can reference via inputsFrom with $initial.fieldName.

actions.description: Ordered list of actions. Each action: id (unique), tool (any MCP tool name from tools/list), optional arguments, optional inputsFrom ($prev.<actionId>.<path> or $initial.<path>).

success.description: True if all actions executed successfully; false if any step failed or validation errors occurred.

errors.description: Validation or high-level execution errors. Present when success is false and the plan could not be run.

results.description: Per-step execution results for each action in the plan (when validation succeeds).

resultTokenCount.description: Estimated token count for the full result payload when resultTooLarge is true.

resultTooLarge.description: True when the aggregated result exceeded the size threshold and was stored as an MCP resource instead of being returned inline.

resultResourceUri.description: URI of the result as an MCP resource (e.g. textellent://result/{id}). Explore via resources/read without loading into context. When done, call release_resource with this URI (or the resource id) to release the resource.

message.description: Human-readable summary of large-result handling or other high-level status.
